keybindings.toggle-tray: Toggle APE display open or closed

settings.tray-display-hint: Toggle - only hide APE display when toggled (using hot key) / When token selected - Hide the APE display if no tokens are selected, show otherwise / Automatic - Toggle for players, When token selected for the GM
settings.assume-default-character-hint: When no other token is selected, show the APE display for the user's default character (usually only set for players). This can help with scenes with no tokens (or a generic party token) visible.
settings.use-control-button: Include a toggle button in token controls
settings.use-control-button-hint: Adds a toggle button to the token controls to open and close the APE display. This can be helpful if you have the APE display set to always show.
settings.show-inspiration-animation-hint: Enables the inspiration animation when an actor has inspiration toggled on. **If you uncheck this box, do not blame me when you forget that you have inspiration. Just saying.**
settings.use-custom-icons-hint: Use custom icons for race and class; If unchecked, use the system icons. **APE includes some AI generated icons for each class and subclass. To be fair they are not very good, but they provide a consistent look and feel. I don't really like them, but also don't really like the default icons. I will work on making better ones, or if anyone wants to help, please let me know.**
settings.show-weapon-mastery-hint: Show weapon mastery labels on weapon items in the Equipped section of the APE display.
settings.show-xp-info-hint: Uncheck if you are using milestone leveling. Check to show current and next level XP with XP progress bar and increment/decrement buttons when clicking on the current XP value.
settings.static-info-hint: Toggle the XP/HP/Rest section between an accordion and a static display.
settings.show-no-uses: Show items with no uses left
settings.show-no-uses-hint: If an item has no remaining uses, it will be removed from the APE display. To keep the item in the display, check this box.
settings.sort-alphabetic-hint: Items are sorted in the order in which they are added to the actor. Use this to sort items alphabetically instead.
settings.show-unprepared-cantrips: Show cantrips even if they are not prepared
settings.show-unprepared-cantrips-hint: (this is an older setting from the original action pack, afaik all cantrips are prepared by default in D&D 5e & 5.5e)
settings.show-unprepared-spells: Show spells even if they are not prepared
settings.show-unprepared-spells-hint: Only prepared spells are shown by default. Check to show all spells, even those that are not prepared which, depending on DM rules, could still be useable.
settings.show-spell-dots-hint: Check to show spell slots as a series of filled/unfilled dots.
settings.show-spell-uses-hint: Check to display the spells slots as a numeric value of uses remaining/total uses.

warning.quantity-limit: Not enough quantity to equip in both slots.
warning.two-handed: You cannot have two two-handed weapons in the same set.
